raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX the charges started on my card that were fraudulent. I was contacted on XX/XX/XXXX that there was activity that was suspicious. A full XXXX days that somebody else was using my card for XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX memberships, and lots of XXXX dinners, where nobody ever has to sign or see anybody. I was rescinded {$1300.00} and that was great. Unfortunately Citibank now is telling me that I owe late charges and interest fees. I call them weekly for updates and never get anywhere. I am passed between Security Operations and Customer Service. They also re-charged charges that are XXXX ( which I don't use ) and a virtual fitness club. This is an absolute nightmare that just will not go away. The late fees and charges are {$130.00}. They have reported to the credit bureau a complaint that I have not paid my bill. I have had the card since XX/XX/XXXX. I have never missed a payment and and have always paid my bill in full. They have ruined my credit because of this. 
I have also filed a complaint with the XXXX Police Case number XXXX. 
I have no way of uploading all of the statements.
